title: The Morning Paper Shakes the World
description: On pages 1–5, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Doflamingo, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6. The central beat is the morning paper shakes the world.
scene: The scene focuses on the morning paper shakes the world, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Doflamingo, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He wasn't frozen through and through ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'LL HAVE TO CHANGE MY PLANS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Can I get some help over here?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The Face of a mere Wanderer ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: and that of a man with determination

summary: The Morning Paper Shakes the World. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
